steps.title: Locate the antecedent
steps.content: The blank pronoun serves as the subject of “represented.” Looking back in the sentence, the noun it must refer to is “aesthetic” in “Marcel Duchamp's abstract cubist aesthetic received the most skepticism from critics.”

steps.title: Match the pronoun to its antecedent
steps.content: Only “it” is singular to match “aesthetic”; “these,” “they,” and “we” are all plural or first-person. “It” correctly refers to the aesthetic and explains what represented a departure from traditional painting. This matches choice D — D is correct.
